properties.name: app.principal.email
properties.description: Email address of the school principal, used for notifications and attendance filtering.

properties.name: app.principal.google-user-id
properties.description: Google User ID of the principal, used to exclude them from the guest list in meeting attendance.

properties.name: app.notifications.enabled
properties.description: Whether automated notifications are enabled for all channels.

properties.name: app.notifications.email.enabled
properties.description: Whether automated email notifications are enabled.

properties.name: app.attendance.late-buffer-minutes
properties.description: Minutes after class start within which a student joining is still marked PRESENT rather than LATE.

properties.name: app.meet.mock
properties.description: Use the mock Meet client instead of the real Google Meet API.

properties.name: app.meet.mock.active-names
properties.description: Comma-separated list of display names treated as active participants in mock mode.

properties.name: app.autojoin.enabled
properties.description: Enable automatic Google Meet join attempts.

properties.name: app.autojoin.provider
properties.description: Auto-join provider implementation to use (noop or playwright).

properties.name: app.autojoin.trigger-offset-seconds
properties.description: Seconds before class start when auto-join should trigger.

properties.name: app.autojoin.join-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Timeout for waiting on auto-join completion.

properties.name: app.autojoin.chrome-profile-dir
properties.description: Chrome user-data directory used by auto-join automation.

properties.name: app.autojoin.chrome-path
properties.description: Optional override path to chrome executable.

properties.name: app.autojoin.retry-max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum auto-join attempts per trigger.

properties.name: app.autojoin.retry-backoff-ms
properties.description: Backoff in milliseconds between auto-join retries.

properties.name: app.autojoin.notify-on-success
properties.description: Notify principal when auto-join succeeds.

properties.name: app.autojoin.require-principal-profile-signed-in
properties.description: Require principal Chrome profile readiness before auto-join.

properties.name: app.autojoin.skip-if-meeting-active
properties.description: Skip auto-join when the room is already active.

properties.name: google.calendar.id
properties.description: Google Calendar ID to sync events from.

properties.name: google.client-secret.path
properties.description: Path to the OAuth client secret JSON file.

properties.name: google.tokens.dir
properties.description: Directory where OAuth tokens are stored.
